$comment: Style-token registry for SDUI variant primitives. Each entry describes intent, per-platform per-OS-tier realization, and an override matrix indicating which inline props may override the variant's defaults. Every tier declares a light and dark spec. Clients read the appropriate tier at render time based on OS version or capability detection; the server reads the override matrix when migrating inline-property bags to variant references.

hero.description: Prominent featured-content surface. Layered shadow, platform material on capable tiers, adaptive background for dark mode.
hero.intent: Celebratory surface that elevates featured content above baseline cards.

26+.light: Liquid Glass effect + 2-layer shadow (radius 6 y 3, radius 12 y 6) + spring press animation; 16pt corner radius
26+.dark: Liquid Glass effect (dark tint) + same layered shadow; corner radius 16pt

17-25.light: .ultraThinMaterial + gradient overlay top-to-bottom (accent 10% -> accent 0%) + spring press; 16pt corner; shadow black@0.12 radius 6 y 3
17-25.dark: .ultraThinMaterial (dark) + gradient overlay accent 20% -> accent 0%; shadow black@0.35 radius 8 y 4

<17.light: Solid Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) + gradient overlay accent 10% -> accent 0% + shadow black@0.12 radius 6 y 3; 16pt corner
<17.dark: Solid Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) (auto-adapts) + gradient overlay accent 20% -> accent 0% + shadow black@0.35 radius 8 y 4

15+.light: Material 3 Expressive Surface + tonalElevation 6dp + expressive shape (RoundedCornerShape(16.dp)) + ripple; shadow elevation 8dp
15+.dark: Same; MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainer automatically shifts for dark theme

12-14.light: Material You Surface + tonalElevation 6dp + RoundedCornerShape(16.dp) + ripple; shadow elevation 8dp
12-14.dark: Same; dynamic color theme handles dark adaptation

<12.light: Flat Material Surface + shadow elevation 6dp + RoundedCornerShape(16.dp) + ripple
<12.dark: Same; static Material3 dark color scheme

modern.light: Background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--surface-raised-top), var(--surface-raised-bottom)); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(140%); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); transition: transform 150ms ease-out on :active
modern.dark: Same tokens; --surface-raised-* resolves dark via prefers-color-scheme

fallback.light: Background: var(--surface-raised); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); no backdrop-filter
fallback.dark: Same; custom properties carry dark values

evidence.iosRefApp: No true hero composite; extrapolated from RefAppComponents.swift L52-69 gradient badge pattern + GameCardView shadow/radius
evidence.androidRefApp: No clear hero; derived from Material 3 conventions

elevated.description: Content card with grouped-background body and light shadow. The everyday card in feeds and lists.
elevated.intent: Baseline card surface for repeated content rows (game cards, VOD cards, content tiles).

26+.light: Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) + cornerRadius 12pt + shadow black@0.08 radius 4 y 2
26+.dark: Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) (semantic, auto-adapts) + shadow black@0.3 radius 4 y 2

17-25.light: Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) + cornerRadius 12pt + shadow black@0.08 radius 4 y 2
17-25.dark: Semantic auto-adapt + shadow black@0.3 radius 4 y 2

<17.light: Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) + cornerRadius 12pt + shadow black@0.08 radius 4 y 2
<17.dark: Semantic auto-adapt + shadow black@0.3 radius 4 y 2

15+.light: Material 3 Card with tonalElevation 2dp + RoundedCornerShape(12.dp) + ripple
15+.dark: Same; dynamic color scheme handles dark surface

12-14.light: Material 3 Card with tonalElevation 2dp + RoundedCornerShape(12.dp) + ripple

<12.light: Material 2 Card with elevation 2dp + RoundedCornerShape(12.dp) + ripple

evidence.iosRefApp: GameCardView.swift L31-39 body (Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) + 12pt + shadow black@0.08 radius 4 y 2)
evidence.androidRefApp: No matching Card/Surface pattern; Material 3 defaults used

banner.description: Full-width promo banner with primary-container tint. No corner radius by default.
banner.intent: Page-width marketing or callout strip that runs edge-to-edge.

15+.light: background: MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer; text: onPrimaryContainer; cornerRadius 0; full width

evidence.iosRefApp: No full-width banner; status strip pattern in GameCardView L53-80 uses Color.red.opacity(0.1) for live tinting
evidence.androidRefApp: MainScreen.kt UserOption L120-128 (MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary + RoundedCornerShape(16.dp) + onPrimary) used as inspiration, adjusted to primaryContainer + 0 radius for full-width banner

subtle.description: Quiet canvas surface. The background a page sits on, or a tinted placeholder region.
subtle.intent: Page canvas or quiet placeholder that recedes visually. Not a card; not a promo.

26+.light: Color(.systemGroupedBackground); no shadow; no corner radius
26+.dark: Color(.systemGroupedBackground) (semantic auto-adapt to dark grouped background)

17-25.light: Color(.systemGroupedBackground); no shadow; no corner radius

<17.light: Color(.systemGroupedBackground); no shadow; no corner radius

modern.light: background: var(--surface); no shadow; no border-radius

evidence.iosRefApp: HomeView.swift L55, FeedView.swift L97 (Color(.systemGroupedBackground)); VODCardView L30-31 placeholder (Color(.tertiarySystemGroupedBackground))

grouped.description: Inset grouped list chrome. Row backgrounds align, interior dividers inset to separator origin.
grouped.intent: iOS-style inset grouped list, or the Android visual equivalent (bordered column with interior dividers).

26+.light: SwiftUI .listStyle(.insetGrouped) on List; otherwise hand-rolled: Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) + cornerRadius 12pt + interior Divider().padding(.leading, content-aligned inset)

17-25.light: .listStyle(.insetGrouped) or hand-rolled with Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) + 12pt radius + interior divider

15+.light: Column with Modifier.border(1.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outlineVariant, RoundedCornerShape(16.dp)) + padding 16.dp + interior HorizontalDivider between rows
15+.dark: Same; dynamic color handles outline/border color

<12.light: Column with 1dp border + 16dp corner + HorizontalDivider; static colors

modern.light: background: var(--surface-raised); border-radius: 12px; interior `hr` elements with margin-left matching row content inset

evidence.iosRefApp: SettingsView L18-23, ProfileView L18-23, StreamsListView L62-78, VideoConfigSheet L20-25 (.listStyle(.insetGrouped)); VODPlaylistView L23-48 (hand-rolled block: secondarySystemGroupedBackground + 12pt + divider inset 104pt aligned to thumbnail)
evidence.androidRefApp: StreamInfoScreen.kt L290-349 (Modifier.border(1.dp, ..., RoundedCornerShape(16.dp)) + padding 16.dp + interior HorizontalDivider)

overlay.description: Media scrim over moving video. Alpha tuned so UI controls remain readable without blocking the video below.
overlay.intent: Readable-controls-over-moving-video. Scoped to media scrim; not a general-purpose semi-transparent surface.

26+.light: .thinMaterial tinted black@0.15 for control legibility over bright video

15+.light: Surface at MaterialTheme.colorScheme.scrim.copy(alpha = 0.4f); graphicsLayer { alpha = 0.7f } for controls readability

12-14.light: Same pattern; scrim defaulted to Color.Black.copy(alpha = 0.4f)

evidence.iosRefApp: VODCarouselView.swift L66-85 (Capsule duration chip at .black.opacity(0.7) over thumbnail)
evidence.androidRefApp: GamePlayerScreen.kt L136-157 and L228-247, EventPlayerScreen.kt L165-181 (SDK-driven streamSelectorStyle.actionBarStyles.backgroundColor; concrete values owned by Video SDK)

hero.description: Large featured artwork. 16:9 aspect ratio, fill mode, medium corner radius.
hero.intent: Poster/artwork tile for featured content rows and carousels.

26+.light: Image().resizable().aspectRatio(16/9, contentMode: .fill).clipShape(.rect(cornerRadius: 12)); frame width fills container

fallback.light: Same (aspect-ratio supported in every modern web target)

evidence.iosRefApp: VODCarouselView.swift L49-92 (200x112 ~= 16:9, aspectRatio(.fill), cornerRadius 8 — extended to 12 for consistency with hero treatment)
evidence.androidRefApp: Not found; derived from standard Compose conventions

thumbnail.description: Smaller content artwork. Fixed dimensions, cover fit, small corner radius.
thumbnail.intent: List-row thumbnail for VOD cards, content rails, compact cells.

modern.light: border-radius: 8px; object-fit: cover; caller supplies width/height

evidence.androidRefApp: Not found; derived from Compose conventions

logo.description: Team/league/sponsor logo. No clip, aspect-fit, constrained max size.
logo.intent: Logo imagery that must retain its native aspect ratio and not clip.

26+.light: Image().resizable().aspectRatio(contentMode: .fit); no clip; caller supplies frame constraints (e.g. 36x36)
26+.dark: Same; logos ship as image assets typically with white/dark variants

15+.light: AsyncImage with Modifier.size(...); ContentScale.Fit; no clip

modern.light: object-fit: contain; max-width and max-height constraints; no border-radius

composers: Team/league logo imagery across game, scoreboard, boxscore composers
evidence.iosRefApp: GameCardView.swift L98-112 (AsyncImage with frame 36x36, aspectRatio(.fit), no clipShape)
evidence.androidRefApp: Not found; derived from Compose conventions

variant_override_blocked.description: Emitted when an inline prop attempts to override an axis the variant's override matrix marks as locked for the current platform. Variant default wins; inline value is ignored.

variant_resolver_missing.description: Emitted when the wire variant string doesn't match any known value in the primitive's enum. Renderer falls through to the primitive default.
